title: urophyllum lanaense
intro: Urophyllum lanaense, a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, is a shrub native to the Philippines. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Urophyllum lanaense can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or tincture, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
